description: You are a biomedical engineer preparing a pre-operative implant sizing report for a cranial reconstruction case. Using the CT Cranium DICOM series loaded in InVesalius 3 and the patient intake brief at /home/ga/Documents/patient_brief.txt, create a bone segmentation mask and generate a 3D bone surface mesh. Record at least five linear cranial measurements, including the maximum transverse diameter, maximum anteroposterior diameter, skull height (vertex to foramen magnum base), and two additional anatomically relevant dimensions. Export the 3D bone surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/implant_sizing.stl and save the complete InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/implant_plan.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
